external_reference.description: Integrator-supplied stable reference for this identity (e.g. their own internal customer ID). Unique per integrator.

state.description: Lifecycle state of the identity's virtual account. See docs/LIFECYCLE.md for the full transition table.
state.title: IdentityState

virtual_account.description: Null while the identity is in "pending" or "failed" state.
virtual_account.title: VirtualAccountSummary

metadata.description: Arbitrary integrator-supplied key-value data, returned as-is.

failure_reason.description: Populated only when state is "failed"; the underlying Nomba error code/message.

401.description: Missing or invalid API key / signature.

message.description: Human-readable description, not stable, do not branch on this.

404.description: Resource not found, or not visible to this integrator's namespace.

message.description: Human-readable description, not stable, do not branch on this.
